title: How to Succeed
author: Dimterion
description: An everlasting story of achieving greatness.

Node 1.label: Node 1
Node 1.text: You wake up in the morning with the idea of a story.

Node 2.label: Node 2
Node 2.text: You continue your day as usual, nothing happens.

Node 3.label: Node 3
Node 3.text: You develop the idea and create something great.

options.text: Give up and go back to your routine

Node 4.label: Node 4
Node 4.text: Now you have more ideas in mind.

options.text: Start working on all of your ideas at once
Focus on your initial idea and develop it fully

Node 5.label: Node 5
Node 5.text: You get overwhelmed and want to go back to sleep.

Node 6.label: Node 6
Node 6.text: You achieve success and can now develop other ideas.
